name: housekeep
description: Small Claude Code skills for keeping your dev workflow tidy

plugins.name: housekeep
plugins.description: Five housekeeping skills (todo, do, papercut, audit-permission-requests, setup-housekeep) plus a prefer-dedicated-tools Bash hook and an audit-permission-requests log hook. setup-housekeep installs a read-only local-search MCP (ripgrep-backed Grep/Glob with path-allowlist gating) and optionally wires both companion hooks. All idempotent.
